name: GNSSSetRefPoint
title: GNSSSetRefPoint
syntax: dword GNSSSetRefPoint( double latitude, double longitude, double altitude )
description: This function defines a reference point that will be used by the functions GNSSAddWpRef and GNSSAddWpRefS to calculate a new waypoint. The unit of the altitude parameter depends on the system of measurement units selected with the GNSSSetUnits function.

parameters.name: latitude
parameters.description: latitude of the reference point in degrees

parameters.name: longitude
parameters.description: longitude of the reference point in degrees

parameters.name: altitude
parameters.description: altitude of the reference point (in m or ft)

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
